reasoning: This sequence aims to depict a warning or cautionary gesture related to non-potable water. The animation will involve both arms moving in a way that suggests a stop or prohibition, similar to a traffic signal. Frame 1 will begin with both arms outstretched, palms facing forward. Frame 2 will move the arms down to shoulder height, palms still facing forward. Frame 3 will have the arms angled outward, palms facing downward, mimicking a stop sign. Frame 4 will have the arms coming back to a slightly more relaxed position, palms facing each other. Frame 5 will end with the arms at the side, suggesting the warning has been conveyed.  The overall movement should be measured and deliberate, reflecting the seriousness of the message.
